productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Blue Sling Bag
description: Deviating from the label's standard leatherette trend, Linos Perros comes up with this line of distressed retro chic denim pieces for the contemporary vintage vibe. Work the 70's aesthetic with this stylish piece and style it with a worn-out denim vest or pants! Height: 26 cm Width: 25 cm Denim upper with leatherette trims and bronze hardware An adjustable shoulder strap Buckle and rivet detail on the front One main compartment with a zippered pocket and two pouches inside One zippered pocket at the back Care Wipe with a clean, damp cloth to remove dust
